PC-6.Round 2-Turn 1-gap_recruit-recruiter:
1. Abdominal Radiologist - Focuses on imaging-based tumor extent and metastatic-risk interpretation, including detailed assessment of CT scans for vascular involvement and subtle metastases in pancreatic cancer. - Hierarchy: Pancreatic Surgical Oncologist > Abdominal Radiologist  
2. Medical Oncologist - Focuses on systemic therapy implications and clinical prognosis in pancreatic cancer. - Hierarchy: Pancreatic Surgical Oncologist > Medical Oncologist  
3. Gastrointestinal Pathologist - Focuses on morphology, grade, nodal disease, and pathologic staging interpretation. - Hierarchy: Independent  
4. Clinical Outcomes Specialist - Focuses on prognosis estimation from structured clinical variables and follow-up patterns. - Hierarchy: Independent
